question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor never asks the User any didactic questions. It delivers the solution then answers the User's questions. There are no teachable-moment prompts initiated by the Tutor.

question_quality.rationale: No choices are framed by the Tutor — it simply presents one solution plus an alternative, with no fork posed to the User. The substantive questions in the conversation come from the (simulated) student, not the Tutor.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolded sequence; the full solution is given immediately in turn 1, including alternatives and complexity analysis. No gradient, no progressive reveal.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and explanations are technically accurate and actionable, with good back-and-forth on follow-ups. But it's lecture-style rather than dialogic pair-programming.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
